items.title: Stocks waver to start the week; Alphabet rises on Berkshire stake: Live updates
items.description: The moves followed a choppy week in which valuation fears, a rotation within the market and a recalibration of Fed rate cut expectations pressured the AI trade.

items.title: NVDA Earnings, FOMC and Other Key Things to Watch this Week
items.description: Markets face a defining week dominated by Nvidia's Wednesday earnings, an event that could determine the trajectory of AI infrastructure investment narratives and broader technology sector leadership heading into year-end.

items.title: Home Depot to suffer massive boycott from holiday shoppers
items.description: Home Depot has been battling weak consumer demand over the past few years amid nationwide concerns over inflation and housing affordability. In Home Depot’s second-quarter earnings report for 2025, it revealed that its U.S. comparable sales increased by 1.4% year over year. However, data from ...

items.title: Fed Minutes, Plus Walmart, Target, Home Depot, Nvidia, and More Stocks to Watch This Week
items.description: The Fed will release its October-meeting minutes on Wednesday, as chances of a December quarter-point rate cut have declined. Companies in the spotlight include Klarna, Medtronic, TJX, and more.

items.title: Trick week for stocks
items.description: Stocks face potentially a volatile week. Not just from the earnings that are due from the likes of Nvidia, Walmart, Home Depot, Lowe's and Target. There's also a bit of unease settling over markets coming from crypto land, where prices for bitcoin, ethereum and other crypto currencies have slumped ...
